title: Getting Started Guide
body: Welcome to the platform. This guide covers the basic setup steps for new users. Follow each section carefully to get up and running quickly.
author: admin@your-domain.internal

title: API Reference
body: This document describes the available API endpoints. Base URL: api.your-domain.internal. Authentication is done via Bearer token in the Authorization header. Rate limit: 100 requests per minute.
author: admin@your-domain.internal

title: Deployment Checklist
body: Before deploying to production: 1) Run all unit tests. 2) Verify CI pipeline passes. 3) Create a release tag. 4) Notify the team in the #deployments channel.
author: admin@your-domain.internal

title: Troubleshooting FAQ
body: Q: Documents not appearing in search? A: Wait 2-5 minutes after indexing. Q: Upload fails? A: Check that document URLs match the datasource URL regex pattern.
author: admin@your-domain.internal

title: Security Policy
body: All internal documents are access-controlled. Do not share API tokens. Rotate tokens every 90 days. Report any suspected breach to security@your-domain.internal immediately.
author: admin@your-domain.internal
